ab: A hakulungen nu pasevana’ay kamu a talalutuk i anini a remiad.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: Tanulikes saan i lutuk sa ci ina.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: A hakulungen nu pasevana’ay kamu a talaumah i anini a remiad.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: A tayra haw kita a mikali tu sera?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: A talacuwa saw kita anini?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: A hakulungen nu pasevana’ay kita a tayra tarawadaw.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: A talacuwa saw kita anini?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: A hakulungen nu pasevana’ay kita a talalutuk.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: A tayra haw kita i tarawadaw?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: Caay, a keriden kita nu pasevana’ay a talalutuk.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: A talalutuk haw kita anini?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: Caay, a talaumah kita anini.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: Pasevana’ay, a u maan saw ku mamelawen nu mita i tarawadaw?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: A tayra kita a mimelaw tu veded.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Pasevana’ay, a u maan saw ku mamelawen nu mita a talalutuk?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: A tayra kita a mimelaw tu adipapang.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: A mimaan saw kita a talaumah?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: A talauamh a mimelaw kita tu nipalumaan a taviras, arawi haw! silalunah, sikaketi yu!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: Pasevana’ay, a tayra haw kita i sauwac a midanguy?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: Caay, a tayra kita mimelaw tu veded.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Pasevana’ay, a talaumah haw kita a paluma tu dateng?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: A tayra kami mikali tu sera.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: Misavahevaher ku veded itila.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: Anini hen kaku a makamelaw tu mauripay a veded.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: Misavahevaher ku adipapang itila.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Huvaw! ay! Maulah kaku tu adipapang, savangcal saan.
ch: B:耶!哇!我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: Misavahevaher ku adipapang itila.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Caay, ka u adipapang kiraan, u udal kiraan.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: Kaitini tu a misamelamelaw, aka katayra i raay yu!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: Hay, a caay katayra i raay kami.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: Aka kavekac, naunen ku rakat, matulu’a.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: Makalah kaku a makamelaw.
en: I want to see them right away.
